Description: Full name, required for all contacts in the Do Not Contact list.
U-M UniqName (user id), or email address for non-UM contacts.
Preferred email address. Only needed for External Contacts or to manually override an @umich.edu address.
Email address, which defaults to the user's U-M level 1 email (@umich.edu) unless overridden by the Preferred Email field.
The specific type of communication for which this contact requested to not be contacted.
